homepage.heroSubline: Transform your space with flooring designed for Ohio's climate. Expert installations that withstand freeze-thaw cycles and humid summers.
aboutText: Founded in 2012, Horizon Flooring began as a small crew serving German Village's historic homes. We've grown to become Franklin County's trusted flooring specialists, preserving the character of Columbus neighborhoods while incorporating modern durability.
Our approach combines meticulous craftsmanship with climate-appropriate materials. We test every product against Ohio's extreme seasonal shifts before recommending it to homeowners.
When we're not installing floors, you'll find our team volunteering at Habitat for Humanity builds or sponsoring local arts events in the Short North.

valueProps.title: Climate-Adaptive Materials
valueProps.description: We use flooring specifically engineered to handle Columbus' freeze-thaw cycles and summer humidity without warping or cracking.

valueProps.title: Neighborhood Specialists
valueProps.description: From Dublin's upscale subdivisions to Clintonville's historic homes, we understand each area's unique architectural needs.

valueProps.title: Full-Service Solutions
valueProps.description: Complete projects from subfloor prep to final molding, including moisture barrier installation for Ohio's clay soil areas.

valueProps.title: Local Supply Chain
valueProps.description: 90% of our materials come from Midwestern manufacturers, reducing lead times and supporting regional businesses.

homepage.ctaSubline: Our Columbus-based consultants will evaluate your space and recommend the perfect flooring solution for your lifestyle and budget.

services.name: Hardwood Floor Refinishing
services.shortDescription: Restore your original hardwood to like-new condition while preserving its historic character.
services.description:
Columbus homes built between 1920-1950 often contain beautiful original hardwood hidden under layers of carpet. Our multi-step refinishing process brings these floors back to life while addressing common Ohio climate challenges.

We begin by testing for moisture content - crucial in our humid summers and dry winters. After careful sanding with dust containment systems, we apply premium finishes that resist scratching from winter grit and salt. For homes in flood-prone areas like the Olentangy River valley, we can incorporate water-resistant sealants.

Special techniques preserve delicate grain patterns in older homes, particularly important for German Village's historic properties. The final buffing creates a lustrous shine that lasts through countless Ohio seasons.
process: Step 1: Comprehensive moisture testing and floor evaluation
Step 2: Dustless sanding with industrial equipment
Step 3: Application of climate-appropriate sealants and finishes
Step 4: Final buffing and protective coating
benefits: Revives original flooring instead of replacement
Increases home value by preserving historic elements
Specialized finishes for pet-friendly homes
Reduces allergens trapped in old floor surfaces

faq.question: How long does refinishing typically take in my Columbus home?
faq.answer: Most projects take 3-5 days depending on square footage and the home's age. We schedule around Ohio's humidity patterns for optimal drying.

faq.question: Can you match my existing hardwood in newer additions?
faq.answer: Yes, we maintain relationships with regional mills to source period-appropriate wood for seamless expansions in homes throughout Franklin County.

services.name: Luxury Vinyl Plank Installation
services.shortDescription: Waterproof flooring perfect for Ohio basements and high-traffic areas.
services.description:
Luxury vinyl plank (LVP) has become the top choice for Columbus homeowners dealing with our climate extremes. Unlike traditional materials, LVP won't warp when basement humidity rises in July or crack during January's deep freezes.

We specialize in installations that handle the unique challenges of Central Ohio homes. In Dublin's newer constructions, we focus on seamless transitions between rooms. For Westerville's ranch homes, we often incorporate underlayment to compensate for slightly uneven slabs. Our Grove City clients appreciate LVP's durability against winter salt and kids' foot traffic.

Every installation includes moisture barrier systems - critical in areas with clay soil that shifts seasonally. We offer premium scratch-resistant finishes that maintain their beauty despite Midwest living.
process: Step 1: Subfloor preparation and moisture testing
Step 2: Acclimation of materials to your home's environment
Step 3: Precision cutting and installation
Step 4: Moldings and transition pieces fitted
benefits: 100% waterproof for basements and kitchens
Warmer underfoot than tile in winter months
Withstands freeze-thaw expansion better than laminate
Pet-friendly textured options prevent slips

faq.question: How does LVP handle Columbus' temperature swings?
faq.answer: Our premium planks have a rigid core designed to expand/contract minimally, preventing gaps even when your thermostat fluctuates between seasons.

faq.question: Can you install over my existing concrete slab?
faq.answer: Yes, after proper evaluation. We've successfully installed in hundreds of Central Ohio basements, including homes near the Scioto River's flood plains.

services.name: Tile Flooring
services.shortDescription: Durable ceramic and porcelain solutions for Ohio's active households.
services.description:
Tile flooring offers ideal performance for Columbus homes dealing with muddy winters and humid summers. Our installations combine beauty with practical solutions for Midwest living.

In entryways, we use textured tiles that provide traction when wet - a must for Upper Arlington homes welcoming snow-covered boots. For sunrooms overlooking the Scioto Mile, we install UV-resistant tiles that won't fade. Bathrooms receive special attention with our mold-prevention underlayment systems.

We source tiles from regional manufacturers whenever possible, including stunning Ohio-made artisan pieces perfect for Clintonville's eclectic homes. Every installation includes proper slope considerations to prevent water pooling - especially important in older homes where floors may not be perfectly level.
process: Step 1: Structural assessment and substrate preparation
Step 2: Custom layout planning with homeowner input
Step 3: Precision cutting with waterjet technology
Step 4: Grouting with stain-resistant formulas
benefits: Easiest flooring to clean after rainy seasons
Cool surface feels great in summer
Withstands heavy furniture moving
Hypoallergenic and mold-resistant

faq.question: Are tile floors too cold for Ohio winters?
faq.answer: We can incorporate radiant heating systems or recommend area rugs for warmth. Many clients find the thermal mass actually helps maintain consistent temperatures year-round.

faq.question: How do you prevent cracked tiles during freeze-thaw cycles?
faq.answer: Our premium thinset mortar contains flexible polymers, and we leave proper expansion gaps - techniques perfected through hundreds of Central Ohio installations.

services.name: Carpet Installation
services.shortDescription: Plush, durable carpets that stand up to Midwest family life.
services.description:
Nothing beats carpet for warmth during Columbus' chilly winters or sound dampening in multi-level homes. We've perfected carpet installations that withstand Ohio's unique challenges while maintaining luxurious comfort.

For families in Hilliard's active neighborhoods, we recommend stain-resistant fibers that handle everything from soccer cleats to spilled juice. In condos near Nationwide Arena, we use premium underlayments that reduce noise transfer between units. Our pet-friendly options include special padding that resists odors - a favorite among German Village dog owners.

Every installation begins with subfloor inspection and moisture testing. We take extra care in basements and over concrete slabs, using vapor barriers to prevent musty smells during humid summers. The final stretching ensures your carpet stays smooth and ripple-free for years.
process: Step 1: Subfloor preparation and moisture barrier installation
Step 2: Precision measuring and custom cutting
Step 3: Professional stretching and seaming
Step 4: Final trimming and edge finishing
benefits: Instant warmth for cold winter mornings
Sound absorption for busy households
Soft landing for kids and pets
Improves indoor air quality with proper padding

faq.question: How do you prevent carpet mold in our humid summers?
faq.answer: We use antimicrobial padding and leave proper ventilation space around edges - techniques developed through 12 years of serving the Columbus area.

faq.question: What's the best carpet for homes with Ohio's winter salt?
faq.answer: We recommend solution-dyed nylon with a textured pattern that hides grit until vacuuming. It's become our top seller in Worthington's established neighborhoods.

services.name: Basement Flooring
services.shortDescription: Specialized solutions for Columbus' below-grade spaces.
services.description:
Ohio basements present unique flooring challenges - from summer humidity to occasional seepage. We've developed specialized solutions that transform these often-underutilized spaces into comfortable living areas.

Our process begins with comprehensive moisture testing using equipment calibrated for Central Ohio's clay soil conditions. For homes near the Olentangy watershed, we often recommend elevated subfloor systems that allow airflow beneath flooring. In Dublin's newer developments, we install dimpled membranes that redirect minor moisture.

Luxury vinyl plank remains our most popular choice, but we also offer ceramic tile with radiant heating for year-round comfort. Every installation includes detailed transition work to upper levels and proper expansion gaps to accommodate seasonal shifts in your home's foundation.
process: Step 1: 72-hour moisture evaluation and pH testing
Step 2: Custom moisture mitigation plan
Step 3: Subfloor preparation specific to basement type
Step 4: Installation with climate-adaptive materials
benefits: Creates usable living space year-round
Prevents musty basement odors
Warm underfoot even in winter
Withstands occasional minor seepage

faq.question: Can you install flooring if my basement has had minor water in the past?
faq.answer: Yes, with proper preparation. We've successfully transformed hundreds of Columbus basements using specialized moisture control systems tailored to each home's history.

faq.question: How long does basement flooring typically last in our climate?
faq.answer: Our installations average 15-20 years thanks to meticulous preparation. We warranty all basement work for 5 years against climate-related issues.

reviews.name: Sarah K.
reviews.text: The team restored our 1937 German Village hardwood to stunning condition. They matched the original finish perfectly and addressed all the squeaks that developed over 80 Ohio winters. The floors look brand new but maintain their historic charm.

reviews.name: James T.
reviews.text: Our Dublin basement flooded twice last spring, ruining the carpet. Horizon installed LVP that looks like real wood but handles moisture perfectly. When we had another heavy rain, the floors wiped clean with no damage. Life-changing for Ohio homeowners!

reviews.name: Megan R.
reviews.text: The tile in our Clintonville sunroom had cracked from years of temperature swings. Horizon installed gorgeous Ohio-made tiles with a special underlayment system. Two winters later, not a single crack despite the wild temperature changes.

reviews.name: David L.
reviews.text: After three failed attempts with other companies, Horizon finally gave us a usable basement floor. Their moisture testing found issues others missed, and the LVP they installed has handled our humid summers perfectly. Worth every penny.

reviews.name: Lisa M.
reviews.text: We needed carpet that could survive two kids and a golden retriever in our Hilliard home. Horizon's recommendation has stood up to a year of muddy paws and juice spills while still looking great. The padding makes it so comfortable underfoot.

reviews.name: Thomas W.
reviews.text: Our Worthington colonial's floors had darkened unevenly over decades. Horizon brought them back to their original honey tone and used a finish that doesn't show winter salt marks. They worked around our antique furniture with incredible care.

service-areas.title: Flooring Service Areas Near Columbus | Horizon
service-areas.description: We serve Dublin, Westerville, Hilliard, Grove City and throughout Central Ohio with premium flooring solutions.

serviceAreas.content: Horizon Flooring proudly serves Dublin, OH, a thriving community known for its upscale subdivisions built from the 1980s to the 2000s. With cold, snowy winters that can cause freeze-thaw damage to flooring, our durable and weather-resistant solutions are perfect for Dublin homeowners. Whether you're updating a classic colonial or modernizing a newer build, we offer premium materials designed to withstand Ohio's harsh climate while enhancing your home's elegance.
serviceAreas.localContext: Dublin features upscale neighborhoods with a mix of classic and contemporary homes, often requiring high-quality flooring solutions.

serviceAreas.content: Westerville, OH, is home to established suburbs primarily built in the 1970s and 1980s, making flooring updates a common need for residents. Horizon Flooring specializes in solutions that combat freeze-thaw damage from cold, snowy winters, ensuring long-lasting beauty and functionality. From timeless hardwood to resilient luxury vinyl, we help Westerville homeowners choose flooring that matches their home's character and stands up to seasonal challenges.
serviceAreas.localContext: Westerville's mature neighborhoods often feature original flooring that may need replacement due to wear or weather damage.

serviceAreas.content: Hilliard, OH, is a family-friendly community with subdivisions predominantly built in the 1980s and 1990s. Horizon Flooring understands the demands of active households and Ohio's cold, snowy winters, which can lead to flooring wear and tear. We provide durable, stylish options like engineered hardwood and waterproof laminate, perfect for Hilliard's busy families seeking both practicality and aesthetic appeal.
serviceAreas.localContext: Hilliard's homes often feature original flooring that may need upgrades to handle modern lifestyles and weather conditions.
